name: Pinata Dog Plush Toy - Boots & Barkley™
description:
Make your furry friend's playtime fun and exciting with this Pinata Dog Plush Toy from Boots & Barkley™. This plush dog toy features vibrant colors and comes with a knotted tail to keep them happily engaged. Made of polyester fabric, the toy is designed as a pinata and is great for fetching and chewing.

Boots & Barkley™: Because pets are just the best.
